name: logging design: a simple non-critical workload gets only baseline logging, evidencing tailoring to the user needs
command:
cat > ps.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"personal blog","criticality":"experimental","availability_tolerance":"days","data_loss_tolerance":"hours","data_sensitivity":"public","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"small","budget_posture":"cost-first","communication_style":"synchronous","consistency_need":"eventual"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile ps.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const O=(j.pillars["operational-excellence"]||[]);const has=c=>O.some(x=>x.concern===c);const src=c=>(O.find(x=>x.concern===c)||{}).source_id;process.exit(has("monitoring")&&has("centralized_logging")&&!has("slo_alerting")&&!has("audit_log_retention")&&!has("access_logging")?0:1)' && echo tailored 1>&2
